FAIL_REC_CNT: Records that fail due to system or processing errors.
REJ_REC_CNT: Records rejected due to validation or compliance violations.
SKIP_REC_CNT: Records skipped due to deduplication or business rules.
TOT_REC_CNT: Total records contained in a provider roster file.
SCS_PCT: Percentage of successfully processed records in a roster file.
SPS_LOAD: Final stage where validated records are loaded into the downstream system.
DART_GENERATION: Stage where provider data is transformed into DART format for downstream processing.
DART_REVIEW: Operational review stage for generated DART output before validation and load.
DART_UI_VALIDATION: Validation stage where DART content is checked through UI or automated rules.
ISF_GENERATION: Stage where intermediate structured files are produced for transformation and validation.
MAPPING_APPROVAL: Stage where submitted source fields are aligned with internal data models.
PRE_PROCESSING: Initial ingestion and preparation stage for incoming roster files.
IS_STUCK: Flag indicating a roster operation is stalled in a pipeline stage.
IS_FAILED: Flag indicating a roster operation has failed and did not complete successfully.
FAILURE_STATUS: Free-text status describing why a roster operation failed or stalled.
AVG_DART_GENERATION_DURATION: Historical baseline for DART generation duration used to detect anomalies.
AVG_SPS_LOAD_DURATION: Historical baseline for final SPS load duration used in health scoring.
